CustomField.description: Formula field. Concatenates the Mailing Street, City, State, Postal Code, and Country fields into a single formatted address block.
CustomField.formula: MailingStreet__c & BR() & MailingCity__c & IF(LEN(MailingCity__c) > 0, ", ", "") & MailingState__c & " " & MailingPostalCode__c & if (LEN(MailingCountry__c)>0,BR()&MailingCountry__c,"")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The full mailing address for this Household, assembled from the individual mailing address fields.
CustomField.label: Mailing Address
